overview: Mardu Transmogrify is a Pioneer midrange deck that leverages disruptive removal and creature recycling to outvalue opponents. By combining early-game interaction with late-game token generation and graveyard recursion, it aims to stabilize and close out games through incremental advantage. The deck thrives on trading efficiently and turning dead creatures into persistent threats.
win_conditions: Overwhelming the board with recycled creatures and tokens via Transmogrify
Disrupting opponent game plans with Thoughtseize to create favorable trades
Generating long-term value and card advantage through Case of the Stashed Skeleton

keep_criteria: Hands with Thoughtseize and a one-drop creature
Two-land hands with early interaction or Transmogrify enablers
Hands containing Case of the Stashed Skeleton alongside removal
mulligan_criteria: Four or more lands with no early disruption
Hands lacking creatures to sacrifice for Transmogrify
Slow hands with only high-cost finishers and no interaction

early_game: Play cheap creatures to establish board presence and provide sacrifice outlets
Use Thoughtseize to remove key threats or combo pieces before they resolve
Prioritize land drops to ensure Transmogrify can be cast by turn three
mid_game: Activate Transmogrify to recycle dead creatures into new threats or tokens
Deploy Case of the Stashed Skeleton to stabilize and generate recurring value
Trade efficiently to maintain board parity while digging for answers
late_game: Loop Transmogrify and recursion effects to outvalue control decks
Flood the board with tokens to pressure aggressive opponents
Hold up interaction for sweepers or finishers while closing out with board presence

key_cards.name: Thoughtseize
key_cards.notes: Use to eliminate key finishers, combo pieces, or high-impact creatures before they impact the board. Prioritize targets that would otherwise force unfavorable trades.

key_cards.name: Case of the Stashed Skeleton
key_cards.notes: Play to recover resources and keep the graveyard stocked for Transmogrify. Use its abilities to stabilize against board wipes or to fuel late-game token generation.

key_cards.name: Transmogrify
key_cards.notes: Sacrifice a creature to create a token or copy of a creature from your graveyard. Sequence after playing a creature or when you need to answer a threat while maintaining board presence.

sequencing_tips: Hold Thoughtseize until you see the opponent's key threat or combo piece
Play a creature before casting Transmogrify to ensure you have a legal sacrifice target
Use Case of the Stashed Skeleton to refill your graveyard before activating Transmogrify
Prioritize land drops in the early game to avoid being mana-screwed for Transmogrify

matchups.advice: Use Thoughtseize on their primary finishers and play early creatures to race. Transmogrify can generate tokens to block multiple attackers.
Play around counterspells by baiting them with low-value creatures. Use Transmogrify and Case of the Stashed Skeleton to outvalue their hand traps.
Race efficiently and use disruption to disrupt their value loops. Transmogrify provides the extra card advantage needed to win long games.
Aggressively use Thoughtseize to find and remove key combo pieces. Keep interaction up and race with early creatures if you cannot disrupt.
